---
id: authorization-role-permissions-controller-add-permission
title: "Add a permission to an environment role"
description: "Add a single permission to an environment role. If the permission is already assigned to the role, this operation has no effect."
sidebar_label: "Add a permission to an environment role"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add a permission to an environment role"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/authorization/roles/{slug}/permissions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Add a single permission to an environment role. If the permission is already assigned to the role, this operation has no effect.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
